summary: Tested notification deep-link and ticket-to-soul enrichment features. All 10 backend API tests PASS. Frontend deep-link working correctly - concierge_reply notifications now navigate to /mira-demo?tab=services&ticket={ticket_id}. Notification dropdown shows per-pet header 'Notifications • {petName}'. Soul enrichment persists learnings from tickets to pet's doggy_soul_answers.
critical_code_review_comments: NotificationBell.jsx correctly prioritizes thread_url in data > construct from ticket_id > fallback link
concierge_reply endpoint correctly creates notifications with thread_url pointing to /mira-demo?tab=services&ticket={ticket_id}
resolve_ticket endpoint now works with mira_tickets collection (not just mira_conversations)
append_message endpoint dual-writes to both mira_conversations and mira_tickets collections
Soul enrichment extracts learnings (allergies, preferences, anxiety triggers) from resolved tickets
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data. Pet Mystique now has ticket enrichment fields: food_allergies_from_tickets=['chicken'], preferences_from_tickets=['swimming'], anxiety_triggers_from_tickets=['thunder and']
context_for_next_testing_agent: Notification deep-link feature verified working. concierge_reply notifications have thread_url in data field pointing to /mira-demo?tab=services&ticket={ticket_id}. Old notifications (request_received type) still have link field pointing to /member?tab=requests - this is expected as they were created before the fix. Soul enrichment working - resolve_ticket extracts learnings from conversation and persists to pet's doggy_soul_answers.

verified_features.notification_per_pet_filter: PASS - API filters notifications by pet_id parameter
verified_features.resolve_ticket_soul_enrichment: PASS - Extracts learnings and updates pet's doggy_soul_answers
verified_features.resolve_ticket_mira_tickets: PASS - Works with mira_tickets collection (not just mira_conversations)
verified_features.thread_url_in_notification_data: PASS - concierge_reply creates notifications with data.thread_url set
